name: Deferred - Old Enemy - 1
description: First returns for old enemies from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] Someone you had crossed in {origin} found cause to remember you again.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] An enemy from {origin} repeated your name in a room where it was not useful to hear it.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] A grievance from {origin} returned in the form of a person who had waited to be better placed.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] Someone wronged or shamed in {origin} had not let the matter die with distance.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] An old rival from {origin} resurfaced with the composure of someone no longer in a hurry.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] A person from {origin} remembered your earlier conflict more clearly than your better moments.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] The enmity born in {origin} found you again when it finally had a shape worth using.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] A face from {origin} returned with patience sharpened into intention.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] An old opponent from {origin} gained enough standing to be troublesome all over again.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] A quarrel from {origin} matured into the kind of malice that can wait.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] Someone tied to {sourceTitle} proved unwilling to let the old slight become history.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] The enemy first made in {origin} found a fresh reason to mention you with contempt.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] A bitterness begun in {origin} came back in the company of better timing.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.mWI6zmHkHhQA84Yp][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] Someone who disliked you in {origin} had acquired the means to be noticed while doing it.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [defer old-enemy 2 1d6] The old hostility from {origin} returned with less heat than before and more danger.
results.name: old-enemy-1

results.description: [bio RollTable.wc0827FvVWKn4eJO][defer old-enemy 2 1d6] An enemy from {origin} had become too settled in their resentment to forget you.
results.name: old-enemy-1
